historical_limitation: TAIFEX OpenAPI endpoints do not support historical backfill queries and remain limited/blocked. TWSE web historical date endpoints support query-by-date (smoke test verified). Bounded historical accumulation is planned via TWSE web endpoints.

normalized_score_candidates.caveat: TWSE web historical date query smoke verified for 20260624-20260626. Still T+1/EOD style data, not intraday.
TWSE web historical date query smoke verified for 20260624-20260626. Margin source is daily/EOD, not intraday.
Lag T+1 EOD snapshot, no historical date query supported.

first_safe_batch_plan.scope: TWSE web historical endpoints only (mi_index, mi_margn, bwibbu_all). TAIFEX remains excluded.
first_safe_batch_plan.estimated_runtime: roughly 2-5 minutes depending on TWSE latency with conservative delay/retry policy
first_safe_batch_plan.command_note: A custom runner script with dynamic command line arguments (e.g. date range / count limiting) is currently missing; only the hardcoded 3-day test script is available. Running a full 50-day backfill batch requires implementing a dynamic command-line runner.
